name: VirtualBox Driver Installed or Started
notes:
This is rule detects VirtualBox driver installation or a start of virtual machines.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Janantha Marasinghe
SIGMA Title: Detect Virtualbox Driver Installation OR Starting Of VMs
SIGMA Description: Detects VirtualBox driver installation or a start of virtual machines


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vboxrt.dll,rtr3init%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vboxc.dll%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vboxdrv.sys%' ) OR ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%startvm%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%controlvm%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY VirtualBox Driver Installed or Started on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vboxrt.dll,rtr3init%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vboxc.dll%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%vboxdrv.sys%' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Command") LIKE '%startvm%' 	OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%controlvm%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: VirtualBox Driver Installed or Started
Event description: Detects VirtualBox driver installation or a start of virtual machines.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
